message:
� Fix Run mission button showing raw unicode escape instead of ↵ symbol (#11122)

The keyboard shortcut label displayed Ctrl\u21b5 as literal text
instead of rendering the ↵ character. Fix by using the actual Unicode
character directly in the source.

Signed-off-by: clubanderson <clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: clubanderson <clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -149,7 +149,7 @@ export function ConfirmMissionPromptDialog({
         >
           {t('confirmMissionPrompt.confirm', 'Run mission')}
           <kbd className="hidden sm:inline-flex px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded bg-white/10 text-[10px] font-mono leading-none">
-            {isMac ? '\u2318' : 'Ctrl'}\u21b5
+            {isMac ? '\u2318' : 'Ctrl'}↵
           </kbd>
         </Button>
       </BaseModal.Footer>
